ops.title: P0b: signing fixtures
ops.description: Two signed test bundles + profile fixtures + secrets in place, so P2's signed-peer trust E2E has real artifacts. apple-certs manual path if needed. Verify: security find-identity + scratch codesign verify.

ops.text: Two distinct signed test bundles exist (different identifiers) usable for cross-team/cross-identifier rejection tests
security find-identity + scratch codesign --verify pass on the fixtures
